app.title: BonAcademy — Bon Air Training Management System
app.description: In-house training planning, execution and tracking system.

cookie.message: This site uses cookies that are strictly necessary for login, language preference and security (Google reCAPTCHA). No advertising or tracking cookies are used.

common.support: If you are experiencing issues, please contact IT support.

login.heading: Sign in to your account
login.tagline: Compliance in aviation starts with training.
login.blurb: BonAcademy plans the mandatory training for Bon Air employees, delivers SCORM content, manages exams, and automatically issues certificates. Each certificate can be instantly verified with a QR code.

error.badWithLeft: Invalid email or password. Attempts left: {left}
error.locked: Your account has been locked after 3 failed attempts. Please contact your administrator.

success.invited: Your account is ready. Sign in with your email and new password.
success.reset: Your password has been updated. Sign in with your new password.

forgot.heading: Forgot Password
forgot.intro: Enter your account email. We will send a reset link valid for 2 hours. Locked accounts can also be unlocked with this link.
forgot.sent: If this email is registered in our system, a password reset link has been sent. The link is valid for 2 hours. Please check your inbox (including spam).

error.rate: Too many requests. Please try again in 15 minutes.

reset.heading: Reset Password
reset.intro: Hi {name}, please set your new password.
reset.hint: At least 8 characters, must include letters and numbers.

error.invalid: The link is invalid or expired. Please request a new reset.
error.weak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include letters and numbers.

invite.heading: Set up your BonAcademy account
invite.intro: Hi {name}, please set your password. This link is one-time use.
invite.hint: At least 8 characters, must include letters and numbers.

error.invalid: The link is invalid or expired. Please ask your administrator for a new invitation.
error.weak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include letters and numbers.
